product.name: ArNeo Light + R50
product.familyDescriptorPl: Fluorescencyjne dzianiny hi-vis na odzież ostrzegawczą
product.familyDescriptorEn: Fluorescent hi-vis knits for safety wear
product.categorySourceGroup: High Visible Warp Knit Fabrics for Safety Jackets
product.titleDescriptor: Economical Safety Jacket Fabric Laminated with Brillant Strips
product.specLine: 70 g/m², 100% Polyester, Brillant Strips Laminated, High Visible Knit Fabric
descriptions: ArNeo Light +R50 is 100% polyester, 65-70 g/m² warp knitted neon colored jacket fabric.
It is an economic alternative to ArNeo Eco for non professional usage.
Designed for construction and mining workwear applications.
The edge of the fabric is laminated with 5 cm brillant strips.
Economical Safety Jacket Fabric Laminated with Brillant Strips
70 g/m², 100% Polyester, Brillant Strips Laminated, High Visible Knit Fabric
technicalParameters: Dimensional Change | -5% < Length < +5% ; -5% < Width < +5% | EN ISO 5077
Dry Cleaning Fastness | 4-5 | EN ISO 105 D01
Hot Press Fastness | 4-5 | EN ISO 105 X11
Azo Test | No Azo Colorants. | EN ISO 14362-1
